diagrams.title: Packet Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the internal structure of a packet with header, payload, and trailer fields
elements: Header (Source Address, Destination Address, Sequence Number, Protocol, TTL)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding packet composition and overhead in packet switching

diagrams.title: Datagram Packet Switching
diagrams.description: Illustrates how packets take independent paths from source to destination through multiple routers
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing connectionless packet forwarding and path independence

diagrams.title: Virtual Circuit Packet Switching
diagrams.description: Shows a pre-established path where all packets follow the same route
elements: Fixed path through Router1 → Router2 → Router3
All packets shown on same path
diagrams.purpose: Understanding connection-oriented packet switching and logical path establishment

diagrams.title: Delays in Packet Switching
diagrams.description: Bar chart or timeline showing different types of delays at each network hop
elements: Total Delay accumulation at each hop
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing and calculating cumulative delays in packet-switched networks

visuals.title: Packet Switching And Its Types
visuals.description: Visual diagram for packet switching and its types
